system.description:
The Iron Hands are renowned for their implacable methods of war, able to capture and hold ground in the face of superior numbers or inhospitable terrain. The Battle-Brother and those within Support Range may spend their Reactions to make a Full Move. This movement must be made towards the nearest enemy. The Space Marines using this ability are immune to pinning until the beginning of their next Turn.

RankImprovement
4Activating this ability becomes a Free Action
system.effect: Kill-team in Support Range may spend Reactions to make Full Move towards nearest enemy; immune to pinning until next Turn

improvements.effect: Activating this ability becomes a Free Action
